summary: Completed testing of customizable booking duration feature. Backend API fully functional (11/11 tests passed). Frontend duration dropdowns working correctly in both create and edit modals with all 6 duration options and correct end time calculation.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns admin role
Backend: Courts endpoint returns all 5 courts (4 padel + 1 calcio)
Backend: Admin create booking with 30min duration (08:00-08:30)
Backend: Admin create booking with 60min duration (09:00-10:00)
Backend: Admin create booking with 90min duration (10:00-11:30)
Backend: Admin create booking with 120min duration (12:00-14:00)
Backend: Admin create booking with 150min duration (07:30-10:00)
Backend: Admin create booking with 180min duration (17:00-20:00)
Backend: Booking without durata uses court default (90min for padel)
Backend: Update booking duration changes end time correctly
Backend: Update booking time and duration together works
Frontend: Calendar view loads with existing bookings
Frontend: Create booking dialog opens on empty slot click
Frontend: Duration dropdown visible in create modal with all 6 options
Frontend: Duration selection updates end time preview correctly
Frontend: Edit booking dialog opens on existing booking click
Frontend: Duration dropdown visible in edit modal with all 6 options
Frontend: Edit duration selection updates end time correctly
seed_data_creation: Test users created with prefix 'test_duration_' - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Duration customization feature is fully implemented and working. Backend supports durata field (30, 60, 90, 120, 150, 180 minutes) in BookingCreate and BookingUpdate models. Frontend AdminCalendar.js has durationOptions array with 6 options. Default duration is 90 min (1h 30min). The ora_fine (end time) is correctly calculated based on ora_inizio + durata.
